action.reasoning: Observation: Best 0.0167 (1/60). Last iteration. 7.4 hours left for eval (~2-3h). Analysis: The action bridge from Pi0 to VLABench is the bottleneck. Pi0 outputs normalized actions that need proper denormalization and scaling. Key improvements: 1) Try larger position scaling (Pi0 outputs ~0.01-0.1 range, need ~0.001-0.01 deltas), 2) Better orientation handling using quaternion math, 3) Better gripper threshold, 4) Use action chunking more aggressively. Decision: Rewrite predict.py with improved action bridge and submit final eval.
